svg.title: Doctor hook not wired terminal output
svg.desc: A terminal-style warning box saying a custom git hook never invokes commitment-issues.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: A git hook does not invoke commitment-issues.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Add the command above to each hook, or delete the hook file so

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: doctor can recreate it. Existing hooks are never overwritten.
